Pay My Bill
Edit Block

It doesn't just disappear. It becomes part of

a system the entire
community relies on.

We treat about 1.3 billion gallons of water each year, so it can return clean and safe to the waterways that run through Alexandria.

What's New Pay My Bill

The System at Work

Every drop that leaves your home comes through here

Your water is treated, tested, and returned, clean and safe, every day. So public health is protected, the Potomac is supported, and life in Alexandria doesn't miss a beat.

It's 1.3+ billion gallons treated each year. Hundreds of thousands of people relying on it. All carefully managed, every step of the way.

Our Work → Planning Ahead → What Guides Us →

Investing in the Community

Helping protect
what matters

This work goes beyond treating wastewater. It shows up in the places people gather, the river that runs through our city, and the everyday health of the community.

These investments show up in shared spaces, local partnerships, and environmental improvements. They help keep Alexandria a place people can count on and be proud of.

Community Benefits Water Management

Community Wins

What this work makes possible,
every day

Sustainability is built in. Water is reused. Energy is generated. Less is wasted. More than 1 billion gallons of water are reused each year, cutting the need for drinking water to be used in operations by nearly 97%.

Methane from the treatment process

Helps power the facility, covering about 50% of our natural gas needs.

→

In Action

Where the work
becomes real

The news and stories from across the watershed. Where we track progress, share milestones, and show how this work impacts the community of Alexandria, daily.

VIEW ALL +
Feb 18, 2025

AlexRenew Achieves Record Low Nutrient Discharge

Advanced biological nutrient removal technology helps protect the Chesapeake Bay watershed from harmful nitrogen and phosphorus runoff.

Workshop

Community Open House & Facility Tour

Sat Apr 12 · 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM

4800 Limerick Street, Alexandria

Get a first-hand look at how AlexRenew treats wastewater, meets our team, and learn what happens after you flush.

Webinar

Water Reuse 101: Turning Wastewater into a Resource

Wed Apr 23 · 12:00 PM – 1:00 PM

Online – Free Registration

Join AlexRenew experts for a live session on advanced water recycling, its role in drought resilience, and what it means for Northern Virginia.

What It Takes

Behind it all,
the numbers tell the real story

40M gallons treated
390K residents served
100% renewable energy goal
70 years serving Alexandria since 1956
